<!-- Code generated by gen-dns-providers; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Configuration for the [Zone.ee](https://www.zone.ee/) DNS provider.

See the [lego documentation](https://go-acme.github.io/lego/dns/zoneee/) for full details.

```yaml
letsEncrypt:
  dnsProvider: "zoneee"
  dnsCredentials:
    # ZONEEE_API_KEY: API key
    apiKey: ""
    # ZONEEE_API_USER: API user
    apiUser: ""
    # ZONEEE_ENDPOINT: API endpoint URL
    endpoint: ""
    # ZONEEE_POLLING_INTERVAL: Time between DNS propagation check in seconds (Default: 5)
    pollingInterval: ""
    # ZONEEE_PROPAGATION_TIMEOUT: Maximum waiting time for DNS propagation in seconds (Default: 300)
    propagationTimeout: ""
```

Credentials are passed directly to lego using strong types and are never written to the process environment.
You may also use the raw lego environment-variable names as keys instead of the normalized names.
